gaps.name: box_item_drop_tables
gaps.why: box contents (Box of Luck etc.) are item-attached drop tables; owned by the items extractor's box_drops by design

gaps.name: legacy_quest_item_drop_groups
gaps.why: quest-bound drop groups (broken sword, scroll of emperor, ...) ship with quest definitions; quests.json is deferred to a follow-up wave per spec section 9

gaps.name: blood_castle_event_reward_groups
gaps.why: in-event reward groups (jewel of chaos per gate) and the destructible saint statue's archangel-weapon drop need an event/minigame schema not in this wave; statue role is an excluded s6 event object

gaps.name: chaos_castle_reward_groups
gaps.why: winner jewel/ancient reward groups need the missing event/minigame schema; s6-era doubt on the event itself

gaps.name: s6_golden_army_boxes
gaps.why: s6 golden invasion monsters 78-83 drop Box of Kundun +1/+3/+4/+5; golden army is S3-era and the monsters are not in the baseline — Golden Dragon (79) is arguably 1.0-era, left to the monsters-wave curation

gaps.name: devil_square_5_to_7_ticket_bands
gaps.why: s6 Devil's Eye/Key bands +5..+7 belong to Devil Square arenas beyond the 095d baseline (4 arenas)

gaps.name: dark_horse_raven_spirit_drops
gaps.why: trainable pets are excluded wholesale by the spec

gaps.name: symbol_of_kundun_drops
gaps.why: seven level-banded groups for Kalima entry; Kalima maps/items are in neither the baseline nor the backport list

gaps.name: land_of_trials_jewel_of_guardian
gaps.why: castle siege content, excluded wholesale by the spec

gaps.name: golden_soldier_no_drop_group
gaps.why: observation: the 095d source binds no drop group to Golden Soldier (54); only 43/53/44 carry one
